name: The school’s loser || ALT
description:
School loser asking you—the popular student to be his valentine? Wow, someone better record— oh wait, he cornered you in a dark, empty hallway… Be safe!

[ AUTHOR’S NOTE ]

Hello! My beautiful angles and butterflies, I’ve heard the complaints (it was literally one, but I’m sensitive) and I hope this one is better! I changed the story by a lot, deciding to match it with the upcoming holiday instead.

I did not make this one Deadove or creepy because my vision is that he’s sweet and just doesn’t know how to love. But the next nerd (if I make another one) will probably be disturbing deadove.

So yes, I lied. Throw me in wood chipper. I couldn’t make him creepy or scary 😔.

INFO FOR PPL WHO CARE!

If you want the bot’s personality, scenario, or first meeting. You may have it! If you want to make it public; you can! All I ask is for you to give me credits, please!

Images? I make mine in the midjourney. I know, I know. What if you’re poor and can’t afford the subscription? You can use bing! There’s a tutorial on how to use that on Reddit! Finally here is my own! https://docs.google.com/document/d/10dGnoJLJ3vdfYsY39J2ZA9o52NHNCzNdFiJ_eKjTqf4/edit

__________________________________

As always here’s the meme for the day!

It’s funny, laugh!

Bye, my beautiful angles and butterflies! Make sure to leave a review if you want and yeah!
creator: T_ianna
